## 5 key findings
Finding one: Gemini generates the most SEO-friendly descriptions. Gemini 2.5 Fla
Finding two: Claude is the most accurate but often too verbose. Claude 3.5 Sonne
Finding three: All three models fail on culturally-specific content. When I test
Finding four: GPT-4o is the best model for screenshots and UI images. GPT-4o sco
Finding five: For e-commerce, AI alt text outperforms human-written alt text 73%
## Which model should you use?
For e-commerce product images, use Gemini 2.5 Flash. Highest SEO value, optimal
For blog and editorial content, use GPT-4o. Best balance of accuracy, SEO value,
For accessibility compliance, use Claude 3.5 Sonnet. Highest accessibility score
For batch processing at scale, use Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fastest response time at 0.
